heading: Retirement: retirement for years of service; selective early retirement
label: 649g Retirement: retirement for years of service; selective early retirement

children.heading: .—Retirement for Years of Services
children.label: a .—Retirement for Years of Services
children.text: Sections 633 through 636 of this title shall apply to the retirement of officers in competitive categories of officers designated for purposes of this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Selective Early Retirement
children.label: b .—Selective Early Retirement
children.text: Sections 638 and 638a of this title shall apply to the retirement of officers described in subsection (a).
